strap: Greater Lincolnshire Manufacturing draws £1.05bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,034 grants, anchored by Nottingham (35%), with Croda Europe and Cambridge Display Technology Ltd (Cdt) on the industrial side. 19 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £55m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — repeated infrastructure commitments reinforce incumbent positions rather than redirecting capability toward new anchors or sub-domain specialisms.
